meta.release_cadence: Stable on Tuesdays. Preview: Tuesdays UTC 23:59. Nightly: daily UTC 00:00.
meta.tldr: This release introduces several key enhancements, including native Windows sandboxing for improved security and Git worktree support for isolated parallel sessions. Policy configurations now require explicit specification of the `toolName`, a breaking change that necessitates updating existing configurations. A new experimental memory manager agent replaces the `save_memory` tool, offering potentially improved memory management. The browser agent gains sensitive action controls and read-only noise reduction, enhancing user privacy. Other notable additions include content-utils for enhanced content processing, an event translator, and updated agent types. The SandboxManager has been refactored to a stateless architecture with an explicit Deny interface, improving security and maintainability. This release also adds support for linking in the extension registry and allows immediate user input during startup. Subagent tool updates now apply configuration overrides immediately, and a security prompt has been added for the browser agent. It is recommended to upgrade to benefit from these security enhancements, new features, and bug fixes, ensuring that you update your policy configurations to include the `toolName` field. There are no specific prerequisites for this upgrade.

features.name: Interactive TUI
features.description: Full-screen terminal UI. Launch with gemini or gemini -m <model>. Supports --include-directories for extra context.

features.name: Headless / Non-Interactive Mode
features.description: One-shot execution via -p flag. Supports structured JSON and streaming output.

features.name: ACP Mode
features.description: Agent Communication Protocol mode. Renamed from --experimental-acp. AI Gateway auth support added.
key_details: Full ACP diff payloads use full paths (fixed)

features.name: Agent Skills (AgentSkills Standard)
features.description: On-demand expertise using the open AgentSkills standard. Skills discovered from workspace and user dirs, injected into context on activation.
activation_flow: 1. Scan and inject name+description into system prompt (metadata only)
2. Model calls activate_skill when task matches
4. SKILL.md body + folder structure added to context + file access granted
5. Skill guidance prioritized for session duration
key_details: SKILL.md standard format (compatible with Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw)

features.name: Subagents
features.description: Custom specialized subagents. Operate in YOLO mode — tools execute without individual confirmation.

built_in_agents.name: cli_help
built_in_agents.purpose: Expert knowledge about Gemini CLI commands and config

key_details: WARNING: Subagents operate in YOLO mode — no per-tool confirmation
Frontmatter: name (required), description (required), kind (local/remote), tools, model, temperature, max_turns, timeout_mins
A2A HTTP authentication support for remote agents (0.33.0)

features.name: Browser Agent
features.description: Web automation via accessibility tree. Supports persistent, isolated, and existing Chrome session modes. Optional visual model for UI-level tasks.

session_modes.existing: Attach to running Chrome with remote debugging

features.name: Sandboxing
features.description: Multiple OS-level isolation options including LXC and gVisor. Trusted folders control per-directory execution policy.
key_details: Trusted folders: control which directories get auto-trust vs confirmation

features.name: Tracker Tools
features.description: CRUD tools for project tracking and visualization within sessions.

features.name: Loop Detection
features.description: Iterative loop detection with model feedback to break out of infinite loops automatically.

features.name: Extensions
features.description: Custom extensions bundling skills, subagents, tools, and commands.

features.name: Plan Mode
features.description: Read-only mode for planning complex changes without executing. Documented Conductor pattern for structured task decomposition.
key_details: Conductor pattern for structured task decomposition

features.name: Checkpointing
features.description: Automatic session snapshots. /rewind to rewind to earlier point. Persists across sessions.

features.name: Session Management
features.description: Multi-session support with new, resume, and list commands.
key_details: Chat resume footer shown on quit with resume instructions (0.33.0)

features.name: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
features.description: MCP server integration for custom tool extensions. Notifications/tools/list_changed support fixed (0.33.0).
key_details: MCP tool output truncation for large responses (0.33.0)

features.name: GitHub Actions Integration
features.description: Official GitHub Action for automated PR reviews, issue triage, and @gemini-cli mentions.
key_details: Automated PR reviews with contextual feedback

features.name: Token Caching
features.description: Caches tokens to reduce costs and latency in long sessions.

features.name: Google Search Grounding
features.description: Built-in Google Search for real-time information grounding.

features.name: Policy Engine
features.description: Fine-grained execution control for enterprise environments.

features.name: Chat Resume Footer
features.description: Adds a chat resume footer on session quit.

features.name: Tracker CRUD Tools & Visualization
features.description: Adds tracker CRUD tools and visualization.

features.name: @file Autocomplete Prioritization
features.description: Improves @file autocomplete to prioritize filenames.

features.name: LXC Container Sandbox Support
features.description: Adds experimental LXC container sandbox support.

features.name: Eval Nightly Summary Table
features.description: Adds an overall pass rate row to the eval nightly summary table.

features.name: Issue Assignee Workflow
features.description: Adds issue assignee workflow.

features.name: Custom Footer Configuration
features.description: Adds custom footer configuration via `/footer`.

features.name: Native gVisor (runsc) Sandboxing Support
features.description: Adds native gVisor (runsc) sandboxing support.

features.name: Clearcut Logging for Startup Statistics
features.description: Implements Clearcut logging for startup statistics.

features.name: Issue Triage Area Documentation
features.description: Adds area/documentation to issue triage.

features.name: /upgrade Command
features.description: Implements /upgrade command.

features.name: Robust IP Validation and Safe Fetch
features.description: Implements robust IP validation and safeFetch foundation.

features.name: Redesign Header Compact
features.description: Redesigns the header in compact mode.

features.name: Telemetry for GitHub Actions
features.description: Adds specific PR, issue, and custom tracking IDs for GitHub Actions.

features.name: OAuth2 Authorization Code Auth Provider
features.description: Adds OAuth2 Authorization Code auth provider for A2A agents.

features.name: Skill Activation via Slash Commands
features.description: Enables skill activation via slash commands.

features.name: Speech-Friendly Response Formatter
features.description: Implements speech-friendly response formatter.

features.name: Background Process Logging and Cleanup
features.description: Implements background process logging and cleanup.

features.name: Per-Model Token Usage in Stream-JSON Output
features.description: Adds per-model token usage to stream-json output.

features.name: Standardized Normalization and Streaming Reassembly
features.description: Implements standardized normalization and streaming reassembly for A2A agents.

features.name: Event-Driven Tool Scheduler
features.description: Switches from callback-based to event-driven tool scheduler for A2A agents.

features.name: Pulsating Blue Border Automation Overlay
features.description: Adds pulsating blue border automation overlay to browser agent.

features.name: Extension Details Dialog and Install Support
features.description: Adds ExtensionDetails dialog and support install.

features.name: Customizable Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Allows users to customize keyboard shortcuts in the CLI.

features.name: Vim Mode Motions
features.description: Adds missing vim mode motions (X, ~, r, f/F/t/T, df/dt and friends) to the UI.

features.name: Literal Character Keybindings and Extended Kitty Protocol Keys
features.description: Supports literal character keybindings and extended Kitty protocol keys.

features.name: Removing Keybindings via '-' Prefix
features.description: Supports removing keybindings via '-' prefix.

features.name: Vim Yank/Paste
features.description: Adds vim yank/paste (y/p/P) with unnamed register.

features.name: Retry Attempt Telemetry for Network Related Retries
features.description: Implements retry attempt telemetry for network related retries.

features.name: Custom Base URL via Env Vars
features.description: Supports custom base URL via environment variables.

features.name: Display Pending and Confirming Tool Calls
features.description: Displays pending and confirming tool calls in the UI.

features.name: Input Blocker Overlay During Automation
features.description: Implements an input blocker overlay during browser agent automation.

features.name: Clearcut Instrumentation for AI Credits Billing Events
features.description: Adds Clearcut instrumentation for AI credits billing events.

features.name: Google Credentials Provider for Remote Agents
features.description: Adds a Google credentials provider for remote agents.

features.name: Safe Tools Execute Concurrently
features.description: Allows safe tools to execute concurrently while the agent is busy.

features.name: Model-Driven Parallel Tool Scheduler
features.description: Implements a model-driven parallel tool scheduler.

features.name: Webfetch Tool Stage 1 Improvements
features.description: Implements Stage 1 improvements for the webfetch tool.

features.name: Native gRPC Support and Protocol Routing
features.description: Enables native gRPC support and protocol routing.

features.name: TodoList Display for Tracker Tools
features.description: Returns TodoList display for tracker tools.

features.name: Allowed Domain Restrictions for Browser Agent
features.description: Adds allowed domain restrictions for the browser agent.

features.name: SandboxManager Integration for Process-Spawning Tools
features.description: Integrates SandboxManager to sandbox all process-spawning tools.

features.name: Tracker Policy
features.description: Adds tracker policy.

features.name: Disable Auto-Approvals
features.description: Adds disableAlwaysAllow setting to disable auto-approvals.

features.name: Topic-Action-Summary Model for Verbosity Reduction
features.description: Implements Topic-Action-Summary model for verbosity reduction in prompts.

features.name: Pre-built Bundle for Browser Agent Chrome Devtool MCP
features.description: Replaces the runtime npx for browser agent chrome devtool mcp with a pre-built bundle.

features.name: Cryptographic Integrity Verification for Extension Updates
features.description: Implements cryptographic integrity verification for extension updates.

features.name: Web Fetch Stage 2 Security and Consistency Improvements
features.description: Implements Stage 2 security and consistency improvements for web_fetch.

features.name: JIT Context Loading by Default
features.description: Enables JIT context loading by default.

features.name: 'All the above' Option to Multi-Select AskUser Questions
features.description: Adds an 'All the above' option to multi-select AskUser questions in Plan mode.

features.name: Linux Sandbox Bubblewrap
features.description: Adds Linux sandbox bubblewrap support.

features.name: Linux Sandbox Seccomp
features.description: Adds Linux sandbox seccomp support.

features.name: Multi-registry architecture and tool filtering for subagents
features.description: Introduces a multi-registry architecture and tool filtering capabilities specifically designed for subagents, enhancing their flexibility and control over tool usage.

features.name: Dynamic Model Resolution
features.description: Adds support for dynamic model resolution to the ModelConfigService, allowing for more flexible model selection and configuration.

features.name: Agent Acknowledgment Command and Enhanced Registry Discovery
features.description: Adds an agent acknowledgment command and enhances registry discovery, improving agent interaction and management.

features.name: 'Blocked' Status for Tasks and Todos
features.description: Adds a 'blocked' status to tasks and todos, allowing users to indicate when a task is waiting on an external dependency.

features.name: Subagent Local Execution and Tool Isolation
features.description: Enables local execution of subagents with tool isolation, enhancing security and performance.

features.name: Plan Mode in Non-Interactive Mode
features.description: Adds support for plan mode in non-interactive mode, allowing users to leverage planning capabilities in automated workflows.

features.name: Strict macOS Sandboxing
features.description: Implements strict macOS sandboxing using a Seatbelt allowlist, enhancing security on macOS systems.

features.name: Content Utils
features.description: Adds content-utils to the core system, providing utilities for content manipulation and processing.

features.name: Partial Threading of AgentLoopContext
features.description: Implements partial threading of the AgentLoopContext, potentially improving performance and responsiveness.

features.name: Memory and JIT Context Injection into Subagents
features.description: Injects memory and JIT context into subagents, allowing them to leverage existing knowledge and improve performance.

features.name: Experimental Memory Manager Agent
features.description: Adds an experimental memory manager agent to replace the save_memory tool, providing a more robust and efficient memory management system.

features.name: Admin-Forced MCP Server Installations
features.description: Adds support for admin-forced MCP server installations, ensuring consistent MCP configurations across environments.

features.name: Git Worktree Support for Isolated Parallel Sessions
features.description: Adds Git worktree support for isolated parallel sessions, enabling users to work on multiple sessions simultaneously without interference.

features.name: Extension Registry Linking
features.description: Adds support for linking in the extension registry, making it easier to discover and install extensions.

features.name: Browser Agent Security Prompt
features.description: Adds a security prompt for the browser agent, alerting users to potential risks before executing browser-based actions.

features.name: Browser Agent Sensitive Action Controls and Read-Only Noise Reduction
features.description: Adds sensitive action controls and read-only noise reduction to the browser agent, improving security and usability.

features.name: Onboarding Telemetry
features.description: Sets up onboarding telemetry to track user adoption and identify areas for improvement.

features.name: Stateless SandboxManager Architecture and Explicit Deny Interface
features.description: Refactors the SandboxManager to a stateless architecture and introduces an explicit Deny interface, improving security and maintainability.

features.name: Event Translator and Updated Agent Types
features.description: Adds an event-translator and updates agent types, improving event handling and agent architecture.

features.name: Full "GEMINI CLI" Logo for Logged-Out State
features.description: Implements the full "GEMINI CLI" logo for the logged-out state, improving the user experience.

features.name: Behavioral Evals Skill
features.description: Adds a behavioral-evals skill with fixing and promoting guides, enabling users to evaluate and improve agent behavior.

features.name: LegacyAgentSession
features.description: Adds LegacyAgentSession to support older agent session formats.

features.name: Behavioral Evaluations for Subagent Routing
features.description: Adds behavioral evaluations for subagent routing, enabling users to evaluate and improve subagent routing decisions.

features.name: Refreshed UX for Composer Layout
features.description: Implements a refreshed UX for the Composer layout, improving the user interface and workflow.

features.name: Write-Protected Governance Files
features.description: Implements sandbox "Write-Protected" Governance Files, enhancing security and preventing unauthorized modifications.

features.name: Dynamic macOS Sandbox Expansion and Worktree Support
features.description: Adds dynamic macOS sandbox expansion and worktree support, improving sandbox flexibility and integration with Git worktrees.

features.name: Immediate User Input During Startup
features.description: Allows immediate user input during startup, improving the responsiveness and user experience of the CLI.

features.name: Native Windows Sandboxing
features.description: Implement native Windows sandboxing for enhanced security.

features.name: AgentSession
features.description: Introduce AgentSession and rename stream events to agent events for better session management.

commands.name: /skills
commands.description: Manage agent skills. list: show all. link <path>: symlink directory. disable/enable <name>. reload: refresh from all tiers.

commands.name: /plan
commands.description: Enter plan mode. Read-only analysis without executing changes.

commands.name: /rewind
commands.description: Rewind session to an earlier checkpoint.

commands.name: /tools
commands.description: Exposes /tools desc as explicit subcommand for discoverability.

commands.name: /upgrade
commands.description: Upgrades the gemini-cli to the latest version.

current.description: Agent Communication Protocol mode. Renamed from --experimental-acp in 0.32.0.
Add additional context directories to the session.
Flag for extensions uninstall to uninstall all extensions.
Adds --admin-policy flag for supplemental admin policies.

env_vars.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: API Key auth via Google AI Studio.

env_vars.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: API Key for Vertex AI backend.

env_vars.name: GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_VERTEXAI
env_vars.purpose: Set to true to use Vertex AI backend instead of Google AI Studio.

env_vars.name: extensionRegistryURI
env_vars.purpose: Changes where the extension registry is read from.

breaking_changes.title: Deprecated settings removal enabled by default
breaking_changes.description: Settings marked as deprecated in prior versions are now removed automatically. Old setting keys in ~/.gemini/settings.json may be silently dropped.
breaking_changes.migration: Review your ~/.gemini/settings.json for deprecated keys and update to current equivalents before upgrading.

breaking_changes.title: Policy Configuration Requires Tool Name
breaking_changes.description: Policy configurations must now explicitly specify the `toolName` field. This change enforces clarity and prevents unintended policy application.
breaking_changes.migration: Update your policy configurations to include the `toolName` field.

notable_keys.agents.browser.visualModel: string — model for visual browser tasks
